title: Pseudo Anonymised Breast Cancer from Questionnaire R0
description: Variables from the breast cancer section of the first round of questionnaire for The Generations Study about the participant's history of breast cancer. This data has been pseudo-anonymised by removing any personal identifiable information (PII) and shifting dates from their original data.

BreastCancers.description: Participant's history of breast cancer or pre-cancer (DCIS or in situ).

R0_BreastCancer.x-question: Have you ever had breast cancer or pre-cancer (DCIS or in situ)?
R0_BreastCancer.description: Participant's history of breast cancer or pre-cancer (DCIS or in situ)

R0_CancerType.x-question: If yes, what type was it? (Cancer, Pre-cancer)
R0_CancerType.description: Type of cancer or pre-cancer diagnosed

R0_AgeAtDiagnosis.x-question: How old were you when Cancer or pre-cancer was diagnosed?
R0_AgeAtDiagnosis.description: Participant's age at diagnosis of cancer/pre-cancer

R0_CancerBreastLocation.x-question: In which breast was Cancer or pre-cancer? (Left, Right, Both)
R0_CancerBreastLocation.description: Location of cancer/pre-cancer in the participant's breast(s)

R0_BreastCancerSurgery.x-question: Did you have surgery for this breast cancer or pre-cancer?
R0_BreastCancerSurgery.description: Surgery status for the participant's breast cancer/pre-cancer

R0_SurgeryType.x-question: What type of surgery was performed for Cancer or pre-cancer? (Biopsy, Lump removal, Full breast removal, Both breasts removed, Other)
R0_SurgeryType.description: Type of surgery performed for the participant's cancer/pre-cancer

R0_RadiotherapyReceived.x-question: Did you receive radiotherapy (radiation treatment) for this cancer or pre-cancer?
R0_RadiotherapyReceived.description: Radiotherapy status for the participant's cancer/pre-cancer

R0_Radiotherapy_Start_Shifted.name: R0_Radiotherapy_Start_Shifted
R0_Radiotherapy_Start_Shifted.description: Derived and pseudo-anonymised month/year. Month and year components are combined into a date with day 15, then shifted by a participant-specific offset, and only the year and month of the shifted date are stored. If the month component is missing (and a year is present) the date is anchored at 1 July (day 1, month 7) of that year before shifting. If the year component is missing the derived value is null.

R0_Radiotherapy_End_Shifted.name: R0_Radiotherapy_End_Shifted
R0_Radiotherapy_End_Shifted.description: Derived and pseudo-anonymised month/year. Month and year components are combined into a date with day 15, then shifted by a participant-specific offset, and only the year and month of the shifted date are stored. If the month component is missing (and a year is present) the date is anchored at 1 July (day 1, month 7) of that year before shifting. If the year component is missing the derived value is null.

R0_BCDrugTreatmentReceived.x-question: Did you receive any drug treatment for the cancer or pre-cancer (e.g. Tamoxifen, chemotherapy)?
R0_BCDrugTreatmentReceived.description: Drug treatment status for the participant's cancer/pre-cancer

BreastCancersExtra.description: Additional details about the participant's breast cancer/pre-cancer history

R0_BreastCancerDiagnosis_Shifted.name: R0_BreastCancerDiagnosis_Shifted
R0_BreastCancerDiagnosis_Shifted.description: Derived and pseudo-anonymised month/year. Month and year components are combined into a date with day 15, then shifted by a participant-specific offset, and only the year and month of the shifted date are stored. If the month component is missing (and a year is present) the date is anchored at 1 July (day 1, month 7) of that year before shifting. If the year component is missing the derived value is null.

DrugTreatment.description: Drug regimens used for the participant's cancer/pre-cancer treatment

R0_DrugTreatment_Num.description: Drug treatment for cancer array number.

R0_BCDrugRegimen_Start_Shifted.name: R0_BCDrugRegimen_Start_Shifted
R0_BCDrugRegimen_Start_Shifted.description: Derived and pseudo-anonymised month/year. Month and year components are combined into a date with day 15, then shifted by a participant-specific offset, and only the year and month of the shifted date are stored. If the month component is missing (and a year is present) the date is anchored at 1 July (day 1, month 7) of that year before shifting. If the year component is missing the derived value is null.

R0_BCDrugRegimen_End_Shifted.name: R0_BCDrugRegimen_End_Shifted
R0_BCDrugRegimen_End_Shifted.description: Derived and pseudo-anonymised month/year. Month and year components are combined into a date with day 15, then shifted by a participant-specific offset, and only the year and month of the shifted date are stored. If the month component is missing (and a year is present) the date is anchored at 1 July (day 1, month 7) of that year before shifting. If the year component is missing the derived value is null.

R0_BCDrugRegimenOngoing.x-question: Are you still using the drug or regimen for drug therapy of cancer or pre-cancer?
R0_BCDrugRegimenOngoing.description: Flag whether the participant is still using the drug or regimen for drug therapy of cancer or pre-cancer.

R0_DrugRegimenName.x-question: Are you still using the drug or regimen used for drug therapy of the cancer or pre-cancer?
R0_DrugRegimenName.description: Name of the drug regimen the participant is currently using

R0_MoreDrugEpisodesFirstBC.x-question: More than two episodes of drug treatment for 1st cancer or pre-cancer.
R0_MoreDrugEpisodesFirstBC.description: Flag whether the participant had more than two episodes of drug treatment for 1st cancer or pre-cancer.
